name: HTS_STAFFING_VOLUMES
description: Staffing volume items planned to repeat each day inside some date range.

columns.Name: STAFFING_VOLUME_ID
columns.Comments: System generated ID identifying the volume

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: STAFFING_VOLUME_CODE
columns.Comments: User Key

columns.Name: SCHED_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to table HTS_SCHED_UNITS

columns.Name: VOLUME_TYPE
columns.Comments:
One of the values of ORA_HTS_WORKLOAD_TYPES lookup:

Baseline, Adjusted, Actual

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start of the date range for which the volume is defined

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End of the date range for which the volume is defined

columns.Name: START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Start time of the volume saved as offset in minutes from the day start

columns.Name: END_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: End time of the volume saved as offset in minutes from the day start

columns.Name: VOLUME_VALUE
columns.Comments: The volume value

columns.Name: VOLUME_INTENSITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Reference to a unique Volume Intensity Code

columns.Name: WEIGHTED_VOLUME_VALUE
columns.Comments: Volume value weighted by the intensity factor

columns.Name: IMPORT_TAG
columns.Comments: Used if wanted to identify an import batch/file (for later deletion)

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to support soft delete. Value 'Y' indicates that the record is deleted. Null or 'N' values indicate the record is not deleted.

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the shift is Regular or On-Call or any custom shift type

columns.Name: ORIG_SYSTEM_REF
columns.Comments: External source system for an imported staffing volume

columns.Name: SOURCE_SYSTEM_KEY
columns.Comments: External source system ID for the staffing plan

columns.Name: DISTRIBUTED_OVER_TIME
columns.Comments: True if the volumes proportionate to duration

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
